description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the java:8 Docker image with two stages: build and deploy. Add a build_doc job in the build stage that runs only on the publish branch, executes the shell commands `apt-get update`, `apt-get -y install graphviz`, `echo '{"allow_root"'  ':'  true '}'   > /root/.bowerrc`, `./gradlew docu:clean`, and `./gradlew docu:build`, and publishes the generated files in `docu/build/jbake/` as an artifact. Add a pages job in the deploy stage that also runs only on the publish branch, depends on the build_doc job, runs `mkdir ./public`, `mkdir -p docu/build/jbake`, and `cp -r docu/build/jbake/* ./public`, and publishes the `public/` directory as the GitLab Pages artifact.
